source.section: 3 - AN/AAQ-28(V) LITENING II Targeting Pod > 3.8 - Air-to-Air Operation > 3.8.3 - Air-to-Air Radar Slaving

steps.action: Make sure the targeting pod and radar are powered
steps.voiced: Confirm targeting pod and radar are powered.

steps.action: Press the A/A Master Mode button. The RDR ATTK (radar) page will appear on the right DDI and the FLIR page will appear on the left DDI.
steps.voiced: Press A/A Master Mode — RDR ATTK appears on right DDI, FLIR on left DDI.

steps.action: Select RDR ATTK page by pressing the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the radar page (right).
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch RIGHT to select the RDR ATTK page.

steps.action: The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
steps.voiced: Confirm Select Focus Diamond appears on the RDR ATTK DDI.

steps.action: Acquire a radar lock using the TDC Slew and TDC DEPRESS controls.
steps.voiced: Acquire a radar lock using TDC slew and TDC DEPRESS.

steps.action: Press the OSB next to RRSLV (radar slave) to slave the slave the targeting pod to the radar lock (L&S trackfile).
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to RRSLV to slave the targeting pod to the radar lock.

steps.action: Select FLIR by pressing the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the DDI with the FLIR page (left).
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch LEFT to select the FLIR page.

steps.action: The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
steps.voiced: Confirm Select Focus Diamond appears on the FLIR DDI.

steps.action: You can zoom and choose desired FLIR/CCD (TV) setting using the appropriate Option Select Buttons on the FLIR page.
steps.voiced: Adjust zoom and FLIR/CCD mode using the OSBs on the FLIR page.

steps.action: Press/bump the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the FLIR format page (left) to attempt to Point Track the target.
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR page to attempt Point Track.
